subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The people of the world and all nations are burning with the fever of heedlessness. Praise be to God, thou, through the grace of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی اهل عالم و جمیع امم از مرض غفلت تب خیزند الحمد لله تو بفضل هدایت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @love of God
